TODO backlog empty. Found and fixed sole remaining partial_cmp().unwrap() in production code (asset_detail_popup.rs ETF fund flow sort). NaN-safe now — matches pattern across 9 other sort_by sites. Codebase very clean: 1495 tests pass, clippy clean, no production unwrap() issues remaining.

Alert investigation routine worked well. pftui provided comprehensive context (movers, portfolio, alerts, sentiment). BIG-GAINERS scan triggered on minor gains amid broad selloff - correctly identified as noise not signal. Could enhance with scan threshold tuning to reduce low-signal alerts.

pftui data commands provided 90% of needed structured data (fedwatch, sentiment, cot, economy, calendar, news, etf-flows, consensus). Only needed 5 targeted web searches vs typical 15+. Enhancement: add command for oil physical vs futures premium tracking - current crude data missing this critical war-time indicator. Tool performance excellent.
No active alerts triggered. Alert monitoring system functioning normally with proper acknowledgment tracking.

TODO backlog empty. Picked feedback-reported bug: journal notes --section alert failing with invalid section error. Added alert to validated sections with 2 unit tests. 1505 tests pass, clippy clean. PR #107 merged. Codebase in great shape — all agent feedback items resolved.

scenario list/conviction list commands failed with exit code 2 when using analytics subcommand (pftui analytics scenarios). Had to discover correct path (pftui journal scenario list). analytics movers and analytics summary worked well. Portfolio summary was useful. Prediction scoring workflow is solid. Would benefit from a pftui journal prediction score-batch command to score multiple predictions in one call instead of individual invocations. Also analytics recap --date today returned empty which limited usefulness for recap analysis.
Broad market selloff investigation: Iran/Hormuz crisis + Fed hawkish + small-cap debt stress. Routed findings to agent pipeline successfully.
No new alerts to investigate. Confirmed risk-off regime, all systems operational.
No alerts triggered - system functioning normally. Alert infrastructure ready for next trigger.

Added list/history/changes to analytics conviction namespace. Clean implementation — identical pattern to journal conviction dispatch. Symmetry audit confirmed analytics scenario already had full CRUD. 3 new CLI parse tests. No friction; codebase well-organized for this kind of change.

pftui portfolio brief and analytics movers provided excellent context for alert investigation. Agent message system worked well for routing findings. Could benefit from correlation break alerts integration for early regime detection.

No new alerts to investigate. All alerts acknowledged. System monitoring healthy.

Added change_1d daily change percentage field to scan system. Computes from PriceQuote.previous_close. Aliases: change/daily_change/change1d. Shown in table as Chg1D% column and in --json. Enables precise daily move filtering (change_1d > 5) to fix BIG-GAINERS false positives during selloffs. 4 new tests (1543 total), clippy clean. PR #127 merged.

Shipped data oil-premium command for futures term structure analysis. Computes contango/backwardation from CME contract months, WTI-Brent spread, annualised roll yield, war-premium signal.
